docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN FILED BY UHLMANN, GORDON
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN FILED BY BLINDS & DESIGNS

DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF APPEARED TODAY, COMPLETED A STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN, BUT LEFT WHEN DEFENDANT ARRIVED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,510.00 FILED BY UHLMANN, GORDON AS TO DEFENDANT BLINDS & DESIGNS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BLINDS & DESIGNS
